creator: riggs@rrr.de
text:
On Mon, 19. Nov 2007, at  0:00 +0700, Eugene Grosbein wrote
according to [Re: ports/117962: [patch] multimedia/mplayer: add an option for AMR audio codecs]:

> Here is a patch for rc2:

Okay, I have used this approach for mplayer and mencoder. Here is the
experimental tarball,
http://www.rrr.de/~riggs/mplayer/m20071119.tar.bz2
which will hopefully be submitted by the weekend unless no other show
stoppers are discovered.

Therefore, I would like for this pr to be closes as your AMR patch will
be part of the cumulative port upgrade.

Thank you and regards,
Riggs

-- 
- "[...] I talked to the computer at great length and
-- explained my view of the Universe to it" said Marvin.
--- And what happened?" pressed Ford.
---- "It committed suicide." said Marvin.
